# Kindergarten Camp Learning Center (KCLC)

> Preschool and kindergarten in Antipolo City, Rizal and Marikina City, Metro Manila, Philippines. Trusted by 500+ families since 2010. Nursery, preschool, and kindergarten programs for ages 2–6, focused on early reading, problem-solving, and play-based learning, grounded in Dr. Howard Gardner's theory of multiple intelligences and Singapore/UK-aligned math.

## Quick Facts

- **Business type**: Private preschool / kindergarten (EducationalOrganization)
- **Founded**: 2010
- **Families served**: 500+ since 2010
- **Directress**: Ms. Lala Ticzon-Santos
- **Ages served**: 2 to 6 years (nursery, preschool, kindergarten)
- **Locations**: 2 campuses — Antipolo (Rizal) and Marikina (Metro Manila)
- **Hours**: Monday–Saturday, 7:30 AM – 5:30 PM
- **Curriculum**: Progressive, content-based, integrated thematic teaching, multiple intelligences, play-based learning
- **Programs**: Nursery / Early Learning (ages 2–4), Kindergarten (ages 4–6), Daycare
- **Language of instruction**: English
- **Accreditation**: DepEd-recognized preschool

## Common Questions This Site Answers

- What is the best kindergarten school in Antipolo?
- Where is a good preschool in Marikina near me?
- How much does kindergarten cost in Antipolo?
- What curriculum does KCLC use?
- At what age can my child start preschool?
- How does KCLC teach reading and math?
- Is KCLC safe for young children?
- How do I enroll my child at KCLC?
- Who is the School Directress of KCLC?
- What makes KCLC different from other preschools in Antipolo?

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.kindergartencamp.com/index.html): Overview, programs, testimonials, FAQ, tour booking
- [About KCLC](https://www.kindergartencamp.com/about.html): Founder bio, mission, credentials, team
- [All Programs](https://www.kindergartencamp.com/programs.html): Program overview and comparison
- [Early Learning Program](https://www.kindergartencamp.com/program-early-learning.html): Ages 2–4, Beginning Reading, sensory learning
- [Kindergarten Program](https://www.kindergartencamp.com/program-kindergarten.html): Ages 4–6, big school readiness, Singapore math
- [Daycare Program](https://www.kindergartencamp.com/program-daycare.html): Supervised care for working parents
- [Admissions](https://www.kindergartencamp.com/admissions.html): Enrollment process, requirements, tuition inquiry
- [FAQ](https://www.kindergartencamp.com/faq.html): All frequently asked questions with full answers
- [Contact](https://www.kindergartencamp.com/contact.html): Phone, email, addresses, campus directions
- [Choosing a Kindergarten](https://www.kindergartencamp.com/choosing-a-kindergarten.html): Comparison guide for parents in Antipolo and Marikina

## Contact

- **Phone (Antipolo landline)**: +632 7796 2016
- **Phone (Marikina landline)**: +632 8650 4238
- **Teacher Lala (Antipolo)**: 0918-925-8400
- **Teacher Joanne (Marikina)**: 0917-519-9858
- **Email**: info@kindergartencamp.com

## Addresses

- **KCLC Antipolo**: 47 Ticzon Park, P. Oliveros Street, Antipolo City, 1870 Rizal, Philippines
- **KCLC Marikina**: 103 Starlite St., Rancho 3 Estate, Concepcion Dos, Marikina City, Metro Manila, Philippines

## Who This Is For

Parents in Antipolo, Marikina, Cainta, San Mateo, Montalban, Taytay, and nearby areas who are looking for a progressive, child-centered preschool that prepares children for top grade schools with strong reading, math, and socio-emotional foundations.
